name: Header search opens a modal and returns vehicle/product results for a query
description: Verifies clicking the header search icon opens a search dialog, and typing a well-known brand name like 'Toyota' returns matching results.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage (/) and click the search icon button in the header (aria-label 'Araç veya ürün ara')
A search dialog opens with a focused text input
The dialog shows at least one result related to Toyota (a vehicle or product list item containing the text 'Toyota')
